name: Douglas “Cheeks” Kurth
summary: Former U.S. Marine Corps aviator who reported observing an unusual disturbance on the ocean during the 2004 Nimitz events.
profileSummary: Former U.S. Marine Corps aviator who reported observing an unusual disturbance on the ocean during the 2004 Nimitz events.
background: Former U.S. Marine Corps lieutenant colonel and aviator.
inclusionNote: Included because his observation preceded the best-known visual interception and adds an independent element to the case timeline.

referenceSources.label: Scientific analysis of the Nimitz encounter
